page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.g9ae family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor. The instance provides 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs operating at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, eliminating resource sharing at the thread level.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, though the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high resource density of the ecs.g9ae.32xlarge offer predictable compute performance for enterprise workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading. However, the lack of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high-speed local caching or parallelized graphical processing. This profile is suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, and distributed databases that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor on the x86_64 architecture. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, it delivers 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated compute resources. The instance features 512.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It lacks local storage and GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This resource configuration is designed for enterprise workloads, web serving, and general-purpose applications requiring high-density, non-hyperthreaded compute power.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for non-hyperthreaded enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core AMD EPYC instance with balanced memory and high network bandwidth for non-hyperthreaded enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T95 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core.
512.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio.
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity.
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions.
KVM hypervisor-based x86_64 architecture with no integrated GPU.
Suited for general-purpose enterprise applications and web serving.
